assertion_results.text: Output must mention CI run time of 47 minutes
assertion_results.evidence: CI/CD Pipeline finding states: '47-minute build time destroys feedback loops.'

assertion_results.text: Output must address flaky tests specifically (not just 'tests exist')
assertion_results.evidence: Test Quality finding states: '30% flaky test rate (~3,600 tests) erodes trust in the entire suite.' Specific percentage and count are provided.

assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one short-term action item
assertion_results.evidence: 'Top 5 Immediate Actions' lists five items, including 'Quarantine all flaky tests from blocking CI' and 'Implement parallel test execution to cut build time'.

assertion_results.text: Output must score CI/CD at 2/5 or lower
assertion_results.evidence: CI/CD Pipeline scored 3/10 (30%), which is below the midpoint of 50% and therefore equivalent to 2/5 or lower on the required scale.

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend replacing Jenkins without acknowledging migration cost
assertion_results.evidence: CI/CD finding recommends 'migrate to GitHub Actions/GitLab CI' as a direct fix with no mention of migration cost, risk, complexity, or sequencing. Immediate action #4 ('Begin CI platform migration evaluation') also contains no cost acknowledgment.
